query: EBRT versus brachytherapy vulvar toxicity comparison

results.title: Ten-year results of the PORTEC-2 trial for high-intermediate risk endometrial carcinoma: improving patient selection for adjuvant therapy.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 30356126. 2018/10/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: PORTEC-2 was a randomised trial for women with high-intermediate 
risk (HIR) endometrial cancer, comparing pelvic external beam radiotherapy 
(EBRT) with vaginal brachytherapy (VBT). We evaluated long-term outcomes 
combined with the results of pathology review and molecular analysis.
METHODS: 427 women with HIR endometrial cancer were randomised between  
to VBT or EBRT. Primary endpoint was vaginal recurrence (VR). Pathology review 
was done i

results.title: Vaginal brachytherapy versus pelvic external beam radiotherapy for patients with endometrial cancer of high-intermediate risk (PORTEC-2): an open-label, non-inferiority, randomised trial.

METHODS: 427 women with HIR endometrial cancer were randomised between
